name: More viewport Culling
description: Significantly boosts FPS on heavy levels by hiding small off-screen objects. Safe: never touches triggers, and automatically restores visibility when objects come back into view.

enable_culling.name: Enable Culling
enable_culling.description: Master toggle for the culling system.

cull_padding_x.name: Horizontal Padding
cull_padding_x.description: Extra horizontal margin added to the visible area. Lower values hide objects closer to the screen edge.

cull_padding_y.name: Vertical Padding
cull_padding_y.description: Extra vertical margin added to the visible area.

check_period.name: Update Frequency
check_period.description: How often (in frames) the culling logic runs. Higher values reduce CPU usage but may cause slight pop-in.

change_threshold.name: Movement Threshold
change_threshold.description: Minimum camera movement (in units) required before re-running culling. Higher values save CPU when the camera is still.

max_small_size.name: Small Object Max Size
max_small_size.description: Objects smaller than this (width or height) are considered 'decorative' and can be hidden even if they belong to groups.
